name: How is permanent disability calculated in Idaho work injury claims?

mainEntity.name: How is permanent disability calculated in Idaho work injury claims?

acceptedAnswer.description: Based on AMA impairment rating, age, occupation, future earnings impact.[4] Scheduled or whole person.[4] Key factors: doctor rating post-healing; state max weekly; lump sum possible.[2] Wait for MMI, dispute low ratings, attorney appeals for fair comp.[3] Ensures lifelong support.
